About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Meet the team and our institutional vision
About.intro: Grupo Exportador del Campo is an agro-industrial holding transitioning from a family business to a corporate institution. We bring the best of the field to your table.
About.mision: To continue the tradition of over 3 generations by providing consumers with quality peppers and vegetables, with high added value guaranteeing the highest quality in the market.
About.vision: A high-volume production and marketing company in domestic and foreign markets, with certified sanitary quality and traceability that gives confidence to the end customer.

honestidad.title: Honesty
honestidad.desc: Always delivering the best to our clients

compromiso.title: Commitment
compromiso.desc: Giving our best and fulfilling our clients' needs

humildad.title: Humility
humildad.desc: Always serving our clients with respect and humility

profesionalismo.title: Professionalism
profesionalismo.desc: A responsible team dedicated to giving its best

lealtad.title: Loyalty
lealtad.desc: Respecting our clients and our commitment to deliver the best

transparencia.title: Transparency
transparencia.desc: Clear accounts, with comprehensive service from start to finish

divisionCampo.title: Field Division
divisionCampo.desc: Our production fields in Loreto, Zacatecas, where the quality of our products is born.

divisionSedis.title: Sedis Division
divisionSedis.desc: Our distribution centers in Monterrey, focused on logistics and national and international reach.

History.title: Our History
History.subtitle: Over 50 years of agro-industrial legacy
History.origen: More than 50 years ago, Mr. Ramiro Vizcaíno started production in Loreto, Zacatecas. Since then, we have grown by expanding our horizons to markets throughout Mexico and the United States, paving the way for future generations.

fundacion.title: The beginning
fundacion.desc: Mr. Ramiro Vizcaíno begins production in Loreto, Zacatecas

crecimiento.title: International expansion
crecimiento.desc: Expansion to markets in Mexico and the United States

segundaGen.title: Consolidation
segundaGen.desc: Consolidation of the family business model

expansionNorte.title: New frontiers
expansionNorte.desc: Arrival in San Nicolás de los Garza, Nuevo León

History.fundadoresDesc: Their legacy is the foundation of what Grupo Exportador del Campo is today

Holding.title: Corporate Structure
Holding.subtitle: Our corporate structure and business units
Holding.intro: Grupo Exportador del Campo operates under a solid corporate structure (similar to FEMSA's structure), organized into business units and strategic divisions focused on excellence, aimed at institutions and commercial allies.

ContactPage.title: Contact
ContactPage.subtitle: We are here to listen to you
ContactPage.bienvenida: Whether you are a supplier, client, or looking for a strategic alliance, we are here to listen to you.
